user.title: Yorkshire Water
user.description: Beta development setup: paste a temporary Yorkshire Water bearer token from a current portal session. Optional account and meter references can be supplied if known. If the token or required references are missing, the integration remains in endpoint discovery mode.

reauth_confirm.title: Reauthenticate Yorkshire Water
reauth_confirm.description: Paste a fresh temporary Yorkshire Water bearer token.

error.invalid_auth: Enter a valid session token or access token

abort.already_configured: This Yorkshire Water account or meter is already configured
